case_title: FLAMENCO, MARIA VS UNICREDIT FINANCIAL GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FLAMENCO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT UNICREDIT FINANCIAL GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER SENT TO INTERPRETER COORDINATOR, HOJ.
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLAMENCO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT UNICREDIT FINANCIAL GROUP, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-29-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNICREDIT FINANCIAL GROUP, INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLAMENCO, MARIA
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF FLAMENCO, MARIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2007 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-18-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
CONTINUED ORDER SENT TO DEFT RETURNED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2008 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-25-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM DANIEL DEAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2008 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO FEB-01-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CONTINUED ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO DEFT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PRESENT ON BEHELF OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLAMENCO, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNICREDIT FINANCIAL GROUP, INC. $3,560.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,560.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS ACTUAL DAMAGES OF $1560.00, AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $2000. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF FLAMENCO, MARIA
